message.content:
@startuml
skinparam rectangle {
  BackgroundColor<<page>> LightGray
  BackgroundColor<<controller>> LightGray
  BorderColor Black
  FontColor Black
}

rectangle "«page»\nmeetstars.html" as meetstars_html
rectangle "«controller»\nMeetStars" as MeetStars
meetstars_html -[dashed]-> MeetStars : «controls»

rectangle "«page»\nmeet_external_link_edit.html" as meet_external_link_edit_html
rectangle "«controller»\nMeetLinkEdit" as MeetLinkEdit
meet_external_link_edit_html -[dashed]-> MeetLinkEdit : «controls»

rectangle "«page»\nmeet_external_links_edit.html" as meet_external_links_edit_html
rectangle "«controller»\nMeetLinksEdit" as MeetLinksEdit
meet_external_links_edit_html -[dashed]-> MeetLinksEdit : «controls»

rectangle "«page»\nmeet_view.html" as meet_view_html
rectangle "«controller»\nMeetView" as MeetView
meet_view_html -[dashed]-> MeetView : «controls»

rectangle "«page»\ntalktomeetorganizer.html" as talktomeetorganizer_html
rectangle "«controller»\nTalkToMeetOrganizer" as TalkToMeetOrganizer
talktomeetorganizer_html -[dashed]-> TalkToMeetOrganizer : «controls»

rectangle "«page»\ntalktofriend.html" as talktofriend_html
rectangle "«controller»\nTalkToFriend" as TalkToFriend
talktofriend_html -[dashed]-> TalkToFriend : «controls»

rectangle "«page»\nmailbox_messages.html" as mailbox_messages_html
rectangle "«controller»\nConversation" as Conversation
mailbox_messages_html -[dashed]-> Conversation : «controls»

rectangle "«page»\nmailboxes.html" as mailboxes_html
rectangle "«controller»\nConversations" as Conversations
mailboxes_html -[dashed]-> Conversations : «controls»

rectangle "«page»\nfriends.html" as friends_html
rectangle "«controller»\nFriends" as Friends
friends_html -[dashed]-> Friends : «controls»

rectangle "«page»\nuser.html" as user_html
rectangle "«controller»\nFriendship" as Friendship
user_html -[dashed]-> Friendship : «controls»

rectangle "«page»\nmyaccount.html" as myaccount_html
rectangle "«controller»\nMyAccount" as MyAccount
myaccount_html -[dashed]-> MyAccount : «controls»

@enduml
